title: Infinite EnderPearl
description: This Data Pack Lets You Put Infinity On A Ender Pearl For It To Have Unlimited Uses.
body:
- This Data Pack Lets You Put Infinity On A Ender Pearl For It To Have Unlimited Uses
 
To Put infinity On A Ender Pearl Just Put A Infinity Book In Your Offhand And A Ender Pearl In Your Mainhand, Have Fun Now :)

functions:
infinite_enderpearl:give
